title: Three Decades of the Spanish Society for Developmental Biology (SEBD): Insights and Emerging Perspectives from the 18th Spanish Society for Developmental Biology Meeting (SEBD 2024).
author_string: Herrera, Eloisa, Acosta, Sandra, Almuedo, María, Borrell, Victor, Cañestro, Cristian et al.
journal_full: The International journal of developmental biology
abstract: The Spanish Society for Developmental Biology (SEBD) organized its 18<sup>th</sup> meeting in October 2024 (hereafter SEBD2024), coinciding with the society's 30<sup>th</sup> anniversary and serving as the stage for its celebrations. This article provides an overview of the event, including the speakers, scientific sessions and the different activities related to the anniversary.
